p2p_enrichment.notes: Added 3 new pass_to_pass checks from repo CI/CD tests: (1) test_repo_training_args_tests - runs pytest on tests/trainer/test_training_args.py (23 tests pass), (2) test_repo_trainer_utils_tests - runs pytest on tests/trainer/test_trainer_utils.py (18 tests pass, includes sampler tests), (3) test_repo_ruff_format_check - runs ruff format --check on modified files. All commands verified working in Docker container on base commit 8efd81513f51cd343d086e0e8f69190caa49dbcf. Skipped: make style (has pre-existing issues), make check-repo (too many checks, some fail), full test suite (too slow >120s), integration tests (require GPU/slow).
